channel.title: Honor Device Co., Ltd. — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Honor Device Co., Ltd. (honor).

image.title: Honor Device Co., Ltd. — recent CVEs

item.title: CVE-2026-31368 · 7.8 HIGH — Privilege Bypass in AiAssistant
item.description: AiAssistant is affected by type privilege bypass, successful exploitation of this vulnerability may affect service availability.

item.title: CVE-2026-31370 · 6.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Information Leak Vulnerability in Honor E
item.description: Honor E APP is affected by information leak vulnerability, successful exploitation of this vulnerability may affect service confidentiality.

item.title: CVE-2026-31369 · 3.2 LOW — Privilege Bypass in PcManager
item.description: PcManager is affected by type privilege bypass, successful exploitation of this vulnerability may affect service availability

item.title: CVE-2025-57840 · 2.2 LOW — Privilege Bypass in ADB
item.description: ADB(Android Debug Bridge) is affected by type privilege bypass, successful exploitation of this vulnerability may affect service availability.

item.title: CVE-2025-57837 · 2.9 LOW
item.description: Tileservice module is affected by information leak vulnerability, successful exploitation of this vulnerability may affect service confidentiality.

item.title: CVE-2025-57839 · 4 MEDIUM
item.description: Photo module is affected by information leak vulnerability, successful exploitation of this vulnerability may affect service confidentiality.

item.title: CVE-2025-57838 · 4 MEDIUM
item.description: Some Honor products are affected by information leak vulnerability, successful exploitation of this vulnerability may affect service confidentiality.

item.title: CVE-2025-1532 · 8.1 HIGH 🌩️ — Code Injection Vulnerability in Phoneservice
item.description: Phoneservice module is affected by code injection vulnerability, successful exploitation of this vulnerability may affect service confidentiality and integrity.

item.title: CVE-2025-2188 · 8.1 HIGH 🌩️ — Whitelist bypass Vulnerability in GameCenter
item.description: There is a whitelist mechanism bypass in GameCenter ,successful exploitation of this vulnerability may affect service confidentiality and integrity.

item.title: CVE-2025-2197 · 4.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Type Confusion Vulnerability in Browser
item.description: Browser is affected by type confusion vulnerability, successful exploitation of this vulnerability may affect service availability.

item.title: CVE-2024-47150 · 3.3 LOW
item.description: Some Honor products are affected by information leak vulnerability, successful exploitation could cause the information leak.

item.title: CVE-2024-47149 · 3.3 LOW
item.description: Some Honor products are affected by incorrect privilege assignment vulnerability, successful exploitation could cause device service exceptions.

item.title: CVE-2024-47148 · 4 MEDIUM
item.description: Some Honor products are affected by incorrect privilege assignment vulnerability, successful exploitation could cause device service exceptions.

item.title: CVE-2024-47157 · 2.9 LOW
item.description: Some Honor products are affected by incorrect privilege assignment vulnerability, successful exploitation could cause device service exceptions.

item.description: Some Honor products are affected by information leak vulnerability, successful exploitation could cause the information leak.

item.description: Some Honor products are affected by information leak vulnerability, successful exploitation could cause the information leak.

item.description: Some Honor products are affected by information leak vulnerability, successful exploitation could cause the information leak.

item.title: CVE-2024-8992 · 4 MEDIUM
item.description: Some Honor products are affected by information leak vulnerability, successful exploitation could cause the information leak.

item.description: Some Honor products are affected by information leak vulnerability, successful exploitation could cause the information leak.

item.title: CVE-2024-8994 · 6.2 MEDIUM
item.description: Some Honor products are affected by information leak vulnerability, successful exploitation could cause the information leak.

item.title: CVE-2024-47151 · 6.3 MEDIUM
item.description: Some Honor products are affected by file writing vulnerability, successful exploitation could cause code execution

item.title: CVE-2024-47156 · 3.3 LOW — Information Leak Vulnerability in Honor Product
item.description: Some Honor products are affected by information leak vulnerability, successful exploitation could cause the information leak.

item.title: CVE-2023-51435 · 7.1 HIGH
item.description: Some Honor products are affected by incorrect privilege assignment vulnerability, successful exploitation could cause information leak.

item.title: CVE-2023-51434 · 9.3 CRITICAL
item.description: Some Honor products are affected by buffer overflow vulnerability, successful exploitation could cause code execution.

item.description: Some Honor products are affected by incorrect privilege assignment vulnerability, successful exploitation could cause information leak.

item.description: Some Honor products are affected by out of bounds read vulnerability, successful exploitation could cause information leak.

item.description: Some Honor products are affected by incorrect privilege assignment vulnerability, successful exploitation could cause device service exceptions.

item.description: Some Honor products are affected by file writing vulnerability, successful exploitation could cause information disclosure.

item.description: Some Honor products are affected by file writing vulnerability, successful exploitation could cause code execution

item.description: Some Honor products are affected by signature management vulnerability, successful exploitation could cause the forged system file overwrite the correct system file
